name: Feature request

labels: enhancement

---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What user need does this solve?

## Proposal

What should Fluent do?

## Alternatives

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope

- [ ] Interface
- [ ] Markdown word files
- [ ] Daily practice
- [ ] Progress
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] Documentation

## Local-First Impact

Does this change how study progress or preferences are saved in the browser?

## Screenshots or References

Add mockups, screenshots, or product references when useful.
